title: hymenopappus filifolius var. parvulus
intro: Hymenopappus filifolius var. parvulus, also known as the smallflower fleabane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been utilized in traditional medicine for various health benefits. The health benefits of Hymenopappus filifolius var. parvulus include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
